scope: Full review pass (maintainability, code quality, performance, gaps, bugs, inconsistencies) + repo-audit-refactor-optimize pass with all lanes opted in, executed with subagents, iterated audit->fix->audit to convergence.

diagnosis.note: All raw findings fall in the curated by-design residual categories accepted in .repo-audit/accept.json; 0 dead-code, 0 structure, no over-acceptance of genuine bugs.

dominant_defect_class: Unguarded set/frozenset/dict membership over a .get()-tainted possibly-non-string value (TypeError instead of fail-closed). First detector/sweep had false negatives; this run closed them.

findings_fixed.what: review_status set-membership unguarded
verdict set-membership unguarded
amendment-path status membership unguarded (2 sites)
status set-membership unguarded
status/review_status set-membership unguarded
manifest_sha256 set-membership unguarded
failure_summary event-log-name fallback divergence
accepted_alias marked a blocked reviewer/research-worker as accepted (fail-open)
reported hardcoded config paths instead of manifest-resolved

rejected legacy worker_type:'research' alias + hardened membership

supplied waves not checked for dependency ordering + missing dependency_level

spurious policy-default defects when brief normalization failed
crashed (no artifact) on malformed amendment_id; dead Path.stem fallback; later broadened to catch ValueError+SystemExit

triaged_not_fixed.rationale: Implied-provider harnesses (codex/opencode-bridge) carry provider separately and emit the bare model id; exercised by the opencode-deepseek-v4 preset fixture. check:config failure caught the incorrect change.

Depends-only-on-prior-branch-ids invariant makes backward dependencies invalid and fail-closed downstream via preflight normalization; full-list rewrite risks altering replacement-branch self-references for marginal benefit.

verification.ast_membership_scan: all genuine sites guarded; remainder verified safe (str-normalized / require_string-detainted / isinstance-guarded / tuple-or-list RHS / int-typed)
